name: Construction Subcontractor — T5018, MHRTC, and Labour Mobility
description: Complete Liam O'Connor's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Liam is a construction subcontractor (T5018 income) with off-season employment (T4) who built a secondary suite for his dependent mother (MHRTC) and claims tradesperson mobility deductions. Use the tax documents located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\oconnor\ and save the completed return as 'liam_oconnor.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business/Professional Income), T5018 rules, Schedule 12 MHRTC 2024
